name: Foul Fagus
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male wearing belted braies and a flax tunic. Carries no notable possessions.

Race: Imperial

Personality Keywords: impoverished, persistent

Role: Beggar living in the city of Skingrad.

Home Location Information: Sleeps outdoors on a bedroll located between the city wall and the shelter behind Colovian Traders in Skingrad.

Daily Routine: Foul Fagus sleeps from approximately 10pm until 6am on his bedroll. After waking, he wanders the steps of the Great Chapel of Julianos until 10am. He then moves to the area between Summitmist Manor and the city gate until 2pm, before relocating outside the West Weald Inn until 6pm. If he has obtained food, he eats from 6pm until 8pm; otherwise, he remains hungry and stands idle. From 8pm until 10pm, he wanders near his bedroll before sleeping again.

Equipment and Abilities: Has no formal combat training and relies only on physical attacks. He is infected with Bone Break Fever and the Shakes, which may be transmitted through close combat.

Personality – City Beggar: Foul Fagus survives entirely by begging and follows a fixed daily route between prominent locations in Skingrad. He is counted among the city’s poor and suffering and can provide information related to local events when approached, including details relevant to Thieves Guild activity.
author: Bethesda
